title: New Quantum Algorithmic Primitives
description: Exploration of cutting-edge quantum algorithmic building blocks including block encodings, quantum signal processing, and the powerful Quantum Singular Value Transformation (QSVT) framework that unifies many quantum algorithms.
learningObjectives: Understand block encodings and their role in quantum algorithms
Master quantum signal processing techniques and polynomial transformations
Apply the QSVT framework to unify disparate quantum algorithms
Analyze the power and limitations of quantum polynomial transformations
Implement practical circuits using modern algorithmic primitives
